ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "jaundice" TEXT /* Whether the patient has jaundice */,
  "autism" TEXT /* Whether the patient has autism */,
  "country_of_residency" TEXT /* Country of residency of the patient */,
  "used_app_before" TEXT /* Whether the patient has used the app before */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the result belongs to */,
  "A1_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A1 */,
  "A2_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A2 */,
  "A3_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A3 */,
  "A4_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A4 */,
  "A5_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A5 */,
  "A6_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A6 */,
  "A7_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A7 */,
  "A8_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A8 */,
  "A9_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A9 */,
  "A10_Score" INTEGER /* Score for question A10 */,
  "screening_date" TEXT /* Date of screening */,
  "screening_tool" TEXT /* Screening tool used */,
  "administrator" TEXT /* Administrator who conducted the screening */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the diagnosis */,
  "age_desc" TEXT /* Age description of the patient */,
  "relation" TEXT /* Relation of the patient to the informant */,
  "Class" TEXT /* Class of the diagnosis (e.g., ASD, NO) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for diagnosis */,
  "administrator" TEXT /* Administrator who conducted the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "plan_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment plan (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app usage */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the usage belongs to */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of app usage */,
  "usage_duration" REAL /* Duration of app usage in minutes */,
  "feature_used" TEXT /* Feature of the app used (e.g., screening tool, treatment plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_usage_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Research area of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher sharing the data */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution receiving the data */,
  "data_shared" TEXT /* Type of data shared (e.g., patient information, research findings) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data sharing agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data sharing agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "app_usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app usage associated with the analytics data */,
  "screening_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screening result associated with the analytics data */,
  "treatment_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment plan associated with the analytics data */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the analytics (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_screening_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("screening_result_id") REFERENCES screening_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_treatment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_app_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_usage_id") REFERENCES app_usage ("usage_id")
)
